purpose: Tie the executable neighbor delivery recipient-consumption chain to its chain claim, proof certificate, object language, underlying transition bundles, and source-status boundaries.
positive_example: neighbor b proc left delivery consumed by empty recipient
boundaries: This bundle covers neighbor delivery recipient chains consumed by init-family or write-buffer command-message logic.
Recipient non-init standard-signal command messages remain blocked by source-status records.
Write-buffer recipient command messages are implemented by ADR-0169, while standard-signal command-token execution remains source-blocked.
No scheduler, topology, or multi-cell timing model is claimed.
